title: fraxinus excelsior var. rostrata
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. rostrata, also known as the green ash or upright green ash, is a deciduous tree or shrub species within the Fraxinus excelsior species, native to Europe and North America. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior var. rostrata include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
